scope: tools/habitat-harness/src/public/**, tools/habitat-harness/src/domains/**, tools/habitat-harness/src/providers/**, tools/habitat-harness/src/runtime/**, tools/habitat-harness/src/config/**, tools/habitat-harness/src/resources/**, tools/habitat-harness/src/service/**
forbids: public facade imports from implementation owners, domains importing provider internals, provider-owned errors defined or imported through generic error buckets, and generic Habitat surfaces hard-coding product vocabulary
why: Habitat is the abstraction layer over vendor tools and repo patterns; its public surfaces and generic service/provider code must stay product-neutral and boundary-driven.
remediate: Expose stable public DTO/schema contracts, import providers through their public module, keep provider errors with their provider, or move product vocabulary into a rule artifact or product-owned domain.
message: Habitat source language or public/internal boundary guard failed.
